rationale: Previous attempt failed at `post1@ =~= post2@` because push's ensures on post1/post2 are only inside the implication antecedent of det_push's ensures, not outer hypotheses. Wrap the proof in `if antecedent { ... }` to make those ensures path conditions, then close view equality by direct substitution, align value_list@ prefixes by instantiating the get_node_ref forall ensures on each pre@[i], and conclude det_push_equal with index_of(*new_value) matched across both posts.
